name: Jiangsu Dewei Advanced Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Dewei Advanced Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development of macromolecular compounds in China. The company offers XLPE insulation compounds, such as chemical and silane cross linkable PE compounds, PE compounds for power cables, and low-smoke halogen-free PE compounds; conductor shielding compounds; and PVC and PE insulation compounds. It also provides PVC, low-smoke halogen-free, and thermoplastic elastomeric compounds; UL series compounds; and PVC insulation, jacketing, and special compounds. The company was formerly known as Suzhou Dewei Industrial Co., Ltd and changed its name to Jiangsu Dewei Advanced Materials Co., Ltd. in 2001. Jiangsu Dewei Advanced Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Taicang, China.
